case_title: FIRST NATIONAL BANK vs. MAGALHAES, LUIZ FELIPE

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT MAGALHAES, LUIZ FELIPE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-19-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-21-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-30-1993

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-19-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON AUG-19-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR SEP-20-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
